commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows hover selection bands across history charts, makes Cost row detail visibility depend on submenu availability, adds focused chart/cost-menu tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows the midpoint-derived selection band and unconditional Cost detail lines, and the PR body's before screenshot shows the visible menu problem; I did not rerun the menu app in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the prior Cost fallback blocker is fixed at the final head, leaving normal maintainer review and CI completion.

target.title: fix: scope chart selection band to bar width and remove cost item detail lines
target.body: ## Summary - shrink chart selection band from midpoint-to-midpoint to bar width: use calendar-day slot width so the grey highlight sits under the bar regardless of gaps in the data - keep selection on the last hovered bar when cursor is between bars — no longer jumps to nearest at the midpoint - keep a single selectable day active across the full plot; no inter-bar gap exists in that case - apply the same fix to `CostHistoryChartMenuView`, `CreditsHistoryChartMenuView`, `UsageBreakdownChartMenuView`, and `PlanUtilizationHistoryChartMenuView` - advance chart days with `Calendar` instead of fixed 86,400-second offsets so bar geometry remains correct across daylight-saving transitions - remove redundant cost detail lines when cost history is available; preserve totals/errors when no history submenu exists ## Tests - update `StatusMenuCostMenuCardTests` to assert the new cost-menu behavior - add pure hover-selection regressions for single-bar, multi-bar, spring-forward, and fall-back behavior - exact-head focused chart and cost-menu suites passed 18 tests, 0 failures - prior range-identical stack passed all 42 sharded groups, 0 failures - exact-head `make check` passed; SwiftFormat clean, SwiftLint 0 violations - final current-main whole-branch autoreview clean (0.86) after the no-history repair ## Verification - built and ran locally; selection band visually confirmed to sit under bar body - band renders identically for all bars including first/last and bars with large data gaps - Cost menu item shows "Cost" with submenu arrow only when history is available; without history, it preserves the prior totals/error visibility policy - final head `59500b56637eae10de3a4716b6c2ca447ae13592` is based on current `main` `0260a9a707062b2cc2db0cc66a297683d83ebf4f` - production/test commits range-diff exactly preserve the cleared stack; the sole rebase conflict retained both additive changelog credits ## Screenshots Before: After:
target.author: elijahfriedman
